meta.listDescription: Manage help categories and frequently asked questions.
meta.categoriesDescription: Manage the help categories shown to users.
meta.questionsDescription: Manage the FAQ questions shown to users.

page.title: Help Center
page.description: Manage the sections and FAQ items shown to users.
page.categoriesDescription: Manage the help categories shown to users.
page.questionsDescription: Manage the FAQ questions shown to users.

hub.categoriesDescription: Create, edit, deactivate, and reorder the sections users see on the help page.
hub.questionsDescription: Create, edit, deactivate, and reorder the FAQ questions users read on the help page.
hub.note: Use the categories page for section structure and the questions page for FAQ content.
hub.inlineNote: The public help page only shows active items.

error.heading: Unable to load help center
error.note: Please try again in a moment.

categoriesEmpty.heading: No categories yet
categoriesEmpty.note: Add a category to organize the questions.

questionsEmpty.heading: No questions yet
questionsEmpty.note: Add a question to start building the FAQ.

questionsEmptyFiltered.heading: No matching questions
questionsEmptyFiltered.note: Try a different search or clear the filters.

categories.title: Categories
categories.note: Keep categories short and easy to scan.

questions.title: Questions
questions.note: Manage the FAQ entries users read on the help page.

category.description: Enter the category details in Arabic and English.

question.description: Enter the question and answer in Arabic and English.
question.viewDescription: Review the full question and answer before editing.

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save the changes. Please try again.

deleteCategory.title: Delete this category?
deleteCategory.description: This category will be removed from the help center.

deleteQuestion.title: Delete this question?
deleteQuestion.description: This question will be removed from the help center.
